A privilege escalation vulnerability exists in the Approval app that allows a user without sharing permissions to force the system to share a file with approvers. This results in an authorisation bypass and privilege escalation, allowing unauthorised distribution of restricted files.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Approval app is upgraded to 2.7.2

### Workarounds

* Disable the Approval app
* No other workaround available

### References

<!-- Link to the main/master PR only -->

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3593780)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/approval/pull/392)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-v8q8-w6c3-3gv9", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-v8q8-w6c3-3gv9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-v8q8-w6c3-3gv9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45275"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-12T08:22:22Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Authorization bypass in approval feature allows unauthorized file sharing with approvers", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T06:41:19Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-v8q8-w6c3-3gv9", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Approval"}, "patched_versions": "2.7.2", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.7.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Authorization bypass in approval feature allows unauthorized file sharing with approvers
